# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure region for the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure AD tenant ID"
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "standard",
      "allowedValues": [
        "standard",
        "premium"
      ]
    },
    "objectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of Azure AD object IDs for applications, managed identities, or service principals"
      }
    },
    "secretNames": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": []
    },
    "secretValues": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": []
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "accessPolicies": "[map(parameters('objectIds'), lambda('objectId', createObject('tenantId', parameters('tenantId'), 'objectId', lambdaVariables('objectId'), 'permissions', createObject('secrets', createArray('get', 'list', 'set', 'delete', 'recover', 'backup', 'restore', 'purge')))))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "[parameters('skuName')]"
        },
        "enabledForDeployment": true,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": true,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": true,
        "enableRbacAuthorization": false,
        "accessPolicies": "[variables('accessPolicies')]",
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Allow",
          "bypass": "AzureServices"
        },
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": 90,
        "enableSoftDelete": true,
        "enablePurgeProtection": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vaultName'), parameters('secretNames')[copyIndex()])]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('vaultName'))]"
      ],
      "copy": {
        "name": "secretCopy",
        "count": "[length(parameters('secretNames'))]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "value": "[parameters('secretValues')[copyIndex()]]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('vaultName'))]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('vaultName')), '2023-07-01').properties.vaultUri]"
    }
  }
}
